scripts.pages:build: npm run install:app && npm run build --prefix my-fit-platform
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run pages:build && npm exec --prefix my-fit-platform -- wrangler pages deploy --commit-dirty=true --skip-caching
scripts.pages:preview: npm run pages:build && npm exec --prefix my-fit-platform wrangler pages dev my-fit-platform/pages-dist --compatibility-date=2026-06-05 --compatibility-flags=nodejs_compat
